data.title: Author onboarding gap audit report with 3 artifact sections + command verification appendix + embedded config key gap list
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What
Author `docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md` — the walking-skeleton deliverable. Human analysis of what's missing, inaccurate, or incomplete in the 3 target artifacts, plus the command-verification appendix (SC2) and embedded output of `scan-config-keys.sh` (SC3).

## Files to Modify
- `docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md` (create)

## Required structure

The report MUST contain these 5 top-level sections (H2) so downstream stories can find their cues:

1. `## Target: root README.md` — findings about what's missing vs. SC2 of the epic (plain-language description of DSO, link to INSTALL.md)
2. `## Target: plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md` — findings about what's missing vs. SC3-SC5 of the epic (marketplace install commands, dep lists, homebrew, bash/coreutils/homebrew prerequisites, /dso:onboarding section, Integration Setup subsections)
3. `## Target: plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` — findings about missing key namespaces
4. `## Command Verification Appendix` — two sub-sections:
   - `### (a) Shell-command execution transcript` — paste-in output of running every standalone shell command in the current INSTALL.md in a clean shell session. Annotate each with the exit code and what failed (if anything).
   - `### (b) /plugin marketplace syntax confirmation` — manual confirmation that the /plugin marketplace add and /plugin install commands in the current docs match https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugin-marketplaces
5. `## Config Key Gap List` — embedded verbatim output of `bash plugins/dso/scripts/scan-config-keys.sh` (run against this repo), dated

Also include the git-blame analysis for README (per comment 1 of the 2026-04-13 enrichment): identify content regression history so SC2 restoration can build on the original.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Report file exists
  Verify: test -f docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Section 'Target: root README.md' exists
  Verify: grep -q '^## Target: root README.md' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Section 'Target: plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md' exists
  Verify: grep -q '^## Target: plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Section 'Target: plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md' exists
  Verify: grep -q '^## Target: plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Section 'Command Verification Appendix' exists with both sub-sections
  Verify: grep -q '^## Command Verification Appendix' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md && grep -q '^### (a) Shell-command execution transcript' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md && grep -q '^### (b) /plugin marketplace syntax confirmation' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Section 'Config Key Gap List' exists
  Verify: grep -q '^## Config Key Gap List' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md
- [ ] Config key gap list section contains the scan output (either the literal output or a note that the scan produced zero gaps)
  Verify: awk '/^## Config Key Gap List/,/^## /' docs/audit/onboarding-gap-report.md | wc -l | awk '{ if (\$1 < 5) exit 1 }'
